entities.woman: a woman in a yellow apron
entities.pot: a large silver pot with steam rising

scenes.title: The Kitchen
scenes.background_prompt: A warm kitchen interior with a gas stove, wooden countertops, a loaf of bread on a cutting board, a window showing rain outside, tiled backsplash. No people.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A warm kitchen interior. A woman in a yellow apron over a white shirt stands near a gas stove, holding a wooden spoon in one hand. On the stove, a large silver pot sits on a burner with thick curls of steam rising from its surface, the lid resting beside it. On the wooden countertop to the right, a golden-brown loaf of bread sits on a wooden cutting board next to a bread knife. A window above the sink shows heavy rain falling outside, with gray clouds visible and raindrops streaking the glass. The kitchen has a tiled backsplash in pale blue, open shelves with jars and cups, and a checkered dish towel hanging from the oven handle. Warm yellow light fills the room.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place woman near the gas stove, standing and holding a wooden spoon. Place pot on the burner with thick curls of steam rising, lid resting beside it.
scenes.scene_description: In the foreground, a large wooden kitchen island with a prominent grain stretches across the bottom of the scene. On the left side of this island sits a rectangular wooden cutting board holding a loaf of sliced bread and two loose slices, with a silver knife featuring a wooden handle resting beside them. Moving to the midground on the left, a woman with brown hair tied in a low ponytail stands facing right. She wears a blue long-sleeved sweater and a yellow apron with dark smudges, holding a wooden spoon in her right hand. She is positioned in front of a beige stove that has a blue and white checkered towel hanging from its handle. On the stove sits a large silver pot with a lid, from which white wisps of steam are rising. Above the stove is a large, conical copper-colored range hood. To the left of the stove, a white ceramic jar holds several wooden utensils, and a similar wooden jar sits to its right. Behind the woman and stove is a backsplash of square, tan-colored tiles. In the center of the midground, a large arched window with a dark wooden frame provides a view of a rainy day outside, showing grey clouds, green trees, and a meadow of yellow and white flowers. Below the window is a white farmhouse sink with a tall silver faucet. To the right of the sink on the wooden countertop are three small potted plants in yellow and terracotta pots. On the far right, two wooden shelves are mounted on the yellow wall; the top shelf holds two wooden bowls and a glass jar with a green lid, while the bottom shelf holds two light blue bowls and two glass jars with wooden lids. Below these shelves on the counter sits a large white ceramic jar with a lid. On the far left, a blue cabinet with a gold knob is partially visible. The overall setting is a cozy, warm-toned kitchen during a rainstorm.
